title: Ad Diraz Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ad Diraz, with a Z-Score of +4.23. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Ad Diraz is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 13.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 42% and the wind speed is at 11.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
